observed_failure: VPQ validator denied valid fixture with VPQ_JSONSCHEMA_LIBRARY_UNAVAILABLE when run under python3 -S.
root_cause: The -S flag disables site initialization, so installed package jsonschema is not visible. The VPQ validator requires jsonschema for schema validation.
corrective_action: Run validators that require installed packages with normal python3; reserve python3 -S for stdlib-only receipt and smoke scripts.
